title: Priority product pages have no answer-first block

evidence.detail: answer_block_candidate.present=false on 3/4 priority pages; only /pricing and /blog/ai-claims-fraud-2026 have a lift-ready extract.

impact: Perplexity and Claude lift from /blog only (4/20 runs). No product or compliance page is structured to be extracted, so intent-heavy prompts (P01, P03, P04) surface zero Claimzilla citations.
recommendation: Add a 40–80 word definitional answer block directly under the H1 on fraud-detection, claims-automation, and hipaa — plain prose, self-contained, no marketing adjectives.

title: Product, FAQPage, and BreadcrumbList schema missing on feature pages

evidence.detail: jsonld_missing_recommended includes Product on both feature pages; FAQPage on all three feature/compliance pages; BreadcrumbList on homepage and HIPAA page.

impact: Google and answer engines have no structured product entity to reconcile against. Shift Technology's product pages carry Product schema; they get cited in every P01/P04 run.
recommendation: Ship three JSON-LD blocks: Product on each /features/* (name, description, brand, offers.priceSpecification pointing at /pricing), FAQPage with 4–6 buyer Qs, BreadcrumbList everywhere non-home.
est_lift: Unlocks Product rich results + improves entity reconciliation in Perplexity/ChatGPT

title: HIPAA compliance page has not been updated in 6+ months

evidence.detail: last_modified_header=2025-10-03, dateModified_jsonld=null, no review byline, no 'last reviewed' copy. Prompt P03 ('Is Claimzilla HIPAA compliant?') scored zero citations across all 4 engines.

impact: Compliance queries explicitly penalize stale freshness. Engines skip pages without a dateModified signal on trust-critical topics.
recommendation: Add dateModified JSON-LD, a visible 'Last reviewed' line, and a short refresh of controls. Target re-review every 90 days going forward.
est_lift: Unblocks eligibility for P03; unlikely to be cited without this fix

title: Homepage LCP is 3.2s — fails Google's 2.5s threshold

evidence.detail: cwv.lcp_ms=3200, inp_ms=180, cls=0.04. Root cause: /hero.mp4 autoplay above the fold.

impact: Homepage is the entity-anchor page. Poor CWV suppresses it across both Google ranking and the SERP-aware engines (Perplexity, Gemini).
recommendation: Defer video, ship a poster frame + play-on-click, or replace with a static SVG hero. Retest with real-device RUM, not lab only.
est_lift: Moves homepage into 'Good' CWV; downstream ranking lift across all prompts

title: Hero and product-demo videos have no transcripts
impact: Video content is invisible to crawlers and answer engines. Competitor pages with transcript blocks convert their demo walkthroughs into extractable prose.
recommendation: Auto-generate transcripts (Whisper), review for accuracy, publish below each embed as visible HTML with timestamps.
est_lift: +500–800 words of indexable demo content per page

title: Product and blog pages lack author byline + reviewer credentials

evidence.detail: eeat_signals.author_byline=false on 3/4 priority pages; blog has byline but reviewed_by=false.

impact: E-E-A-T is weak on the pages that most need to signal expertise. Insurance buyers and engines both lean on author credentials for trust-critical verticals.
recommendation: Add a Person JSON-LD node + visible byline with credentials (years in insurance, prior employer, LinkedIn) to every feature and compliance page. Add 'Reviewed by [name]' on HIPAA.
est_lift: Raises author entity in Google Knowledge Graph; compounds over time

title: Orphan page with zero links in, no title, no schema

evidence.detail: depth=3, internal_links_out=0, title='Untitled', word_count=64, jsonld_present=[]. Nothing links to it.

impact: Wasted crawl budget + thin-content footprint drags sitewide quality score.
recommendation: Decide: retire (301 to the nearest relevant page) or rebuild with a title, schema, and 3–5 inbound internal links. Do not leave in current state.
est_lift: Removes thin-content signal; minor sitewide ranking cleanup

title: Meta descriptions are too short to drive SERP clicks

evidence.detail: meta_description lengths: 22 chars (claims-automation), 23 chars (hipaa), 28 chars (about). Target range is 140–160.

impact: Sub-30-char descriptions give Google nothing to snippet against; SERP CTR drops and the page never accrues the engagement signals that AI engines weight.
recommendation: Rewrite each to 140–155 chars, lead with buyer-outcome verbs ('Reduce fraud-loss ratio by…'), include one product term and one proof term.
est_lift: +5–12% organic CTR on the affected pages

title: Twitter card type set but no twitter:image on feature pages

evidence.detail: twitter.card='summary_large_image' but no explicit og:image override tested for social preview. OG image defaults only.

impact: Lower click-through on LinkedIn/X when practitioners share links; minor but compounds over 12 months of organic sharing.
recommendation: Ship page-specific OG images (1200×630) with the product name and a one-line value prop for each /features/* page.
est_lift: Marginal CTR lift on social referrals

title: Claimzilla cited in only 4/20 LLM test runs — all from one blog post

evidence.detail: P01/P03/P04 = 0 citations across all engines. P02 and P05 cite /blog/ai-claims-fraud-2026 only. Shift Technology dominates 18/20 runs.

impact: Buyers asking the highest-intent questions ('best fraud tool', 'HIPAA compliant', 'best for mid-sized carriers') never see Claimzilla in AI answers.
recommendation: Concentrate the next 30 days on: (a) answer-first blocks on the three priority pages [F01], (b) Product+FAQPage schema [F02], (c) a Wikidata QID and entity reconciliation so ChatGPT/Gemini can resolve 'Claimzilla' as a brand.
est_lift: Target: 6–9 citations/20 runs within 60 days; Shift share drops below 50%
